name: Butterscotch Apple Crumb Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a large bowl, mix together the lemon juice, sliced apples, sugar, flour, cinnamon, and salt until well combined.
3. Pour the mixture into the prepared pie shell.
4. Bake for 45-50 minutes or until the apples are tender and the topping is golden brown.
5. Allow to cool before serving.
